description:
The RGB colour model is employed to visualise vegetation conditions and their temporal dynamics across three user-defined periods (T1, T2, and T3). To ensure a consistent and unambiguous interpretation of the legend, the time periods - representing different years in this case - are assigned sequentially to the RGB channels.

The vegetation change model is derived from a semantic Earth Observation data cube and incorporates all available Sentinel-2 observations within each respective time period. For every pixel, the model computes the proportion of vegetation occurrences relative to all valid observations, excluding those affected by clouds or snow.

Consequently, the model captures not only temporal changes in vegetation cover but also variations in vegetation intensity and transitions between vegetated and non-vegetated states. Vegetation proportions are encoded as integer values within the corresponding RGB colour channels, enabling the simultaneous representation of vegetation dynamics across the three time periods.

![Legend](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/GTIF-Austria/public-catalog/refs/heads/main/assets/Cube_legend_landscape_en.jpg)
